sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 카르바나 FY2025: 매출 200억 달러 첫 돌파, 순이익 18억 9,500만 달러로 연간 기록 경신

keyPoints.text: FY2025 매출이 사상 처음으로 200억 달러를 돌파해 전년 대비 49% 증가했으며, 소매 판매 대수도 43% 성장해 중고차 시장 점유율이 약 1.6%로 확대됐다.
GAAP 순이익 18억 9,500만 달러(순이익률 9.3%)와 GAAP 영업이익 18억 8,100만 달러를 달성해 수익성 기준으로 업계 1위를 두 배 이상 격차로 유지했다. 다만 순이익에는 이연법인세 평가충당금 환입 관련 비현금 이익 약 6억 2,100만 달러가 포함됐다.
S&P 500 기업 중 2025년 매출 성장률 상위 2% 안에 진입했으며, 누적 고객 거래 건수가 500만 건 이상을 기록하는 주요 이정표를 달성했다.

riskChanges.text: 순이익에는 Root 주식 취득 워런트 공정가치 변동으로 인한 부정적 영향 약 6,400만 달러가 포함됐으며, 비현금 항목 변동이 향후 수익 인식에 영향을 줄 수 있다.

businessChanges.text: 재고 풀을 전국 34개 거점으로 확장해 물류비용을 절감하고, Q4에 평균 배송비를 60달러 인하했으며 평균 배송 시간도 하루 단축해 고객 경험을 개선했다.
자동화 고도화로 차량 판매 고객의 상당수가 전 과정을 상담사 없이 완료하게 됐고, 판매 건당 통화 수가 Q4에 전년 대비 약 25% 감소했다.

financialHighlights.text: FY2025 매출 200억 달러(+49% YoY), 순이익 18억 9,500만 달러, GAAP 영업이익 18억 8,100만 달러로 연간 기준 전 지표 사상 최고치를 달성했다.
이연법인세 평가충당금 환입에 따른 비현금 순이익 기여분이 있었고, 추가로 Root 워런트 공정가치 손실 6,400만 달러가 순이익을 차감했다.
창업 이래 13년간 총 100억 달러 이상의 투자를 통해 현재의 수직 통합 역량과 업계 최고 수익성의 기반을 구축했다.

watchItems.text: 순이익 18억 9,500만 달러 중 일회성 세금 항목을 제외한 현금 이익 품질을 다음 분기에서 확인하는 것이 핵심이며, 조정 EBITDA 마진 추이도 중요 모니터링 포인트다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: EX-99.1 2 a9918-k123125.htm EX-99.1 Document Exhibit 99.1 Annual Results 1 2025 Highlights FINANCIAL RESULTS & COMPANY MILESTONES • Accelerated year-over-year growth in retail units and revenue ◦ Grew retail units by 180,293 (43%) year-over-year, bringing used market share to ~1.6% ◦ Revenue over $20 billion for the first time, up 49% year-over-year ◦ Exceeded 5 million cumulative customer transactions • Achieved record company-level profitability ◦ Net income of $1.895 billion, Net income margin of 9.3% 1 ▪ Net income included a net non-cash benefit of $621 million ◦ GAAP Operating income of $1.881 billion, GAAP Operating margin of 9.3% ◦ Adjusted  Normalized numeric aliases: $20 billion = 200억 달러; 5 million = 500만 달러; $1.895 billion = 18억 9,500만 달러; $621 million = 6억 2,100만 달러; $1.881 billion = 18억 8,100만 달러; $2.237 billion = 22억 3,700만 달러; $20 = 20달러; $1.895 = 1.895달러; $1.881 = 1.881달러; $621 = 621달러; $2.237 = 2.237달러; $118 = 118달러; $355 = 355달러; 180,293 million = 1,802억 9,300만 달러.

2025 revenue growth in the top 2% of S&P 500 companies • Recognized by Forbes as one of the Best Large Employers for 2026 GIVING BACK TO CUSTOMERS TO DRIVE BETTER EXPERIENCES • Expanded vehicle selection by 20,000 vehicles year-over-year • Brought cars closer to more customers by growing inventory pools to 34 locations nationwide ◦ Passed on lower shipping costs to customers in the form of $60 lower shipping fees on average year-over-year in Q4 ◦ Reduced frequency of customer delays by ~10% year-over-year • Delivered cars to customers faster than ever before ◦ Reduced average delivery times by 1 full day year-over-year ◦ Share of retail sales with same day or next day deliveries more than doubled year-over-year • Shared fundamental finance and cost of funds gains with customers through lower APRs • Simplified and personalized the e-commerce experience ◦ Over 30% of car buyers and 60% of  Normalized numeric aliases: $60 = 60달러; 20,000 million = 200억 달러.

car sellers now complete entire process without speaking to an Advocate until vehicle delivery or pick up ◦ Average calls per sale down ~25% year-over-year in Q4 1 Net income in FY 2025 was positively impacted by ~$685 million associated with the release of our valuation allowance against our deferred tax assets and recording of the full tax receivable agreement liability. Additionally, Net income for FY 2025 was negatively impacted by ~$64 million associated with changes in the fair value of our warrants to acquire Root common stock. 2 Dear Shareholders, 2025 was another exceptional year full of exciting results and significant milestones. We grew retail units by 43% and sold just shy of 600,000 cars. We crossed $20 billion in annual revenue. We crossed  Normalized numeric aliases: $685 million = 6억 8,500만 달러; $64 million = 6,400만 달러; $20 billion = 200억 달러; $1 billion = 10억 달러; $2 billion = 20억 달러; $685 = 685달러; $64 = 64달러; $20 = 20달러; $2 = 2달러; $1 = 1달러; 600,000 million = 6,000억 달러.

that are growing fast. And they all come from the same root. 13 years and $10 billion invested ago, our team set a clear vision to achieve a big goal. And then we just kept marching. We believed that by building a fundamentally different business we could deliver fundamentally different customer experiences and fundamentally different financial results. Today, our progress validates that belief. We are the most profitable automotive retailer by a factor of two and the fastest growing by a long way. Our success is driven by a simple principle: everything we do starts with the customer, and we work backward from there. We are built to deliver simpler, faster, more confidence-inspiring transactions that deliver greater value with greater selection. Even with all of our progress, we still have the headroom of many early-stage startups. At a scale of ~600,000 sales per year, we represent  Normalized numeric aliases: $10 billion = 100억 달러; $10 = 10달러; 600,000 million = 6,000억 달러.
